DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CENTRAL APARTMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT KENNETH M. KARP AS TRUSTEE OF THE KARP MARITAL TRUST AND KARP RESIDUARY TRUST, DBA CENTRAL APARTMENTS LENORE F. KARP AS TRUSTEE OF THE KARP MARITAL TRUST AND KARP RESIDUARY TRUST, DBA CENTRAL APARTMENTS -

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ERIC J. NGUYEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KENNETH KARP AS TRUSTEE OF THE KARP MARITAL TRUST AND KARP RESIDUARY TRUST DBA CENTRAL APARTMENTS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KENNETH KARP. DEFENDANT LERNORE F. KARP TRUSTEE AS TRUSTEE OF THE KARP MARITAL TRUST AND KARP RESIDUARY TRUST DBA CENTRAL APARTMENTS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY HER SON KENNETH KARP. DEFENDANT DBA CENTRAL APARTMENTS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MICHELLE HORNEFF-COHEN, AGENT AND KENDRICK CLAYTON, PROPERTY MANAGER. THE COURT ALLOWED THE EMPLOYEES AT DBA CENTRAL APARTMENTS WERE PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT.
